children.text: Service List - Phoenix

Price transparency is key to ensuring access and preventing surprise medical bills. If you're an existing Tia member, you can reach out to our Care Coordinators who can provide a detailed estimate on the service or appointment you're interested in. We also recommend reading
our guide
for help confirming your insurance benefits.
Important billing reminders:

If you have in-network insurance with Tia, we will submit your claim to your health insurance company first. We recommend contacting your health plan to check if a service is covered and any patient responsibility like copays, deductibles or coinsurance. If there is a remaining balance after your insurance company has paid their portion, we will bill you for your patient responsibility.

Tia does not process labs or specimens directly, regardless of your in-network status. A third party (Quest, for example) will bill you directly for these services.  Learn more about Lab Billing at Tia.
There’s more than one path to your health

Get whole-body, women-focused care when you need it with Tia Essential, or join as a Tia member for a more personal, supported journey. Whichever path you choose, our commitment to your health and our high-quality care stays the same.
Tia is the only in-person and virtual clinic specifically designed for women across all stages of life

Unlike prescription-only or virtual-only options, we focus on your whole-body health. Unlike your traditional doctor, we’re highly specialized in women’s health. And unlike concierge medicine or other membership-based clinics, we offer a membership-free option. Here’s what you can expect from Tia:
✓ All-in-one care
All of your health needs, including primary care, gyn, labs, acupuncture, and more, all in one place
✓ Women-first, women-focused
High-quality care with highly specialized providers who deeply understand women’s bodies and your unique needs
✓ Fits your lifestyle
Get in-person care if you value that face-to-face, or fit virtual visits into your busy schedule
✓ Options for care
Tia Essential gets you quality care with no membership fee, or join as a Tia member for a more supported experience

cells: Get care for your whole body, from primary care to mental health
See a provider in days, not months
Feel supported through every stage of life, from fertility to menopause
Enhance your care with services like acupuncture, nutrition guidance, skin care, and more
Get a personalized plan from compassionate care team that understands and supports you
Access care in the way that works for you with virtual or in-person visits, plus labs or referrals as needed
Use your insurance, with most major PPOs accepted
Coordinated support for booking, insurance, referrals, and follow care
More flexibility with same day, walk-in lab work, and appointment rescheduling

controlModules.title: Two ways to join, one shared focus: you.

children.text: Talk to Our Team
Have questions about Tia’s care?
Speak with a member of our Engagement Team at
Why use Tia Essential?

Tia Essential offers a new way to receive Tia’s high-quality, compassionate care without a membership fee. Whether you need a partner for your whole-body health, lightweight support for a well-managed chronic condition, or just reliable care for occasional visits, we've got you covered. This isn't bare-minimum care—it's our signature quality on a "here when you need us" basis, helping you maintain a better baseline of health over time.
Why join Tia as a member?

Our membership option offers a higher level of continuous support, and is designed for women who want greater transparency, personalization, and support throughout their health journey. This option is great for women who want to go deeper into their health or who value the convenience of having someone handle the often messy logistics of healthcare.
The Tia Experience
What will your journey look like?

Everyone’s journey at Tia may look a little different. As a Tia Essential patient, you may come to us first for help with an acute issue like a UTI and then only see us 1x a year. And that’s okay! For Tia Essential patients and Tia members who want to dig a bit deeper into their health, we follow a three-step process that starts you on your
Whole Health Journey
, a holistic model designed to address your immediate concerns and long-term wellness.
Getting started
A three-step process for getting started at Tia
Whether you choose Tia Essential or want to join as a Tia member, getting started is easy:
1. Check your insurance coverage
We’ll validate your insurance details when you sign up for Tia Essential or Tia and will confirm your in-network status before going forward.
2. Schedule your first appointment

Most patients begin with our new patient establishment of care visit to set the foundation for their health journey. During this time, we'll explore your current health concerns, goals, preferences, and health history.
3. Get started on your care journey

For those in need of an annual preventative exam, your provider may recommend this as a first step. If you have different needs, we'll collaborate with you to develop a care plan that works for you and your goals.
All of your care, all in one place
Locations
Find a Tia clinic near you
Care that meets you where you are with virtual and in-person appointments in New York, California, and Arizona.
Why our patients love Tia

testimonials.Content: Going to Tia was the best experience ever. The staff was attentive and the best part is that they were all women!! I've never like going to the OB/GYN but going to Tia made it more enjoyable and less scary.
testimonials.Title: TJ

testimonials.Content: My doctor was smart, clear, and respectful. My nurse practitioner was friendly and made a blood draw easy. Front desk was great. And the building was clean and well designed.
testimonials.Title: Kelsey

testimonials.Content: The clinic is a beautiful space. my healthcare provider was super genuine and really worked with me and helped me understand the best route for caring for myself. I felt very comfortable and supported.
testimonials.Title: Rachel

testimonials.Content: Tia is amazing in every way and I feel the the care I receive is superior to all other health services I've experienced. The emphasis on full body health and women is unmatched and I tell everyone I know about Tia!
testimonials.Title: Lena

testimonials.Content: The whole experience, start to finish was wonderful! The space is beautiful, my doctor was so attentive, checkin and checkout were so easy.
testimonials.Title: Elyse

testimonials.Content: Great people, warm and aesthetically pleasing atmosphere, felt taken care of from start to finish and have already recommended Tia to a few friends. So good!
testimonials.Title: Sarah

testimonials.Content: Great attention, from the administrator at the front desk who helped me book an appointment for another day and showed me to a peaceful spot where I could wait. To the provider who was attentive, funny, a good listener and made me feel so at ease.
testimonials.Title: Monica

children.text: Questions about care at Tia? Call 646-650-5337
Two options, one standard.

Quality healthcare shouldn't be gatekept. Choose the Tia Membership for priority access, insurance support, and more flexibility. Select Tia Essential for the same high-quality care with a self-guided experience.
Two options, one standard.

Quality healthcare shouldn't be gatekept. Choose the Tia Membership for priority access, insurance support, and more flexibility. Select Tia Essential for the same high-quality care with a self-guided experience.
Tia's Whole Health approach
No matter your plan, care at Tia starts with the same whole health approach.
✓ Care for every stage of life
Tia is where all your health needs come together in one place. We offer primary care, gynecology, menopause care, acupuncture, skin care, mental health support and more.
✓ Led by women's health experts
Clinicians who understand how complex and connected women's health issues can be.
✓ Care that's always convenient
Virtual and in-clinic visits, insurance-friendly care, and thoughtfully designed spaces that make it easier to keep up with your health wherever you are.
✓ Specialized care when you need it
Our care is backed by partnerships with top hospitals and health institutions, including Cedars Sinai and UCSF.
We do not currently accept Medicaid.

cells: Birth control implant insertion (not including cost of device)

children.text: *Groups are not covered by insurance.

cells: Specialized acupuncture for IUD insertion or removal (excludes cost of IUD procedure)*

children.text: *Acupuncture for IUD insertion or removal is a more specialized intervention with a longer appointment time and increased 1:1 time with an acupuncture provider.

cells: Clinical Wrinkle Care - Express* (for up to 30 units)
Clinical Wrinkle Care - Comprehensive* (for up to 60 units)

children.text: *Aesthetic services are not covered by insurance

Each patient visit may vary depending on the required treatment and tests ordered by the provider. If you have insurance coverage, please contact your health plan for questions about in-network coverage and your use of cash payment for covered services.

Cash prices are the costs for medical care associated with an appointment or procedure. These costs aren’t reimbursed by insurance. In some cases, patients have the option of billing insurance (if accepted) or paying the cash price out of pocket, so Tia strives for transparency on what we charge.

Healthcare prices vary by region for most healthcare providers including Tia, based on factors like labor costs (such as physician or therapist wages), costs associated with having in-person clinics (like real estate and medical supply costs), and based on terms set in partnership with health plans in different markets. Tia aims to provide price transparency for services by market to enable access and to avoid surprise medical bills.

faqs.question: Why are cash prices different by clinic?

children.text: If you have in-network coverage with Tia then your health plan will be billed the cost of your medical care. However, patients are still responsible for their co-pay and/or coinsurance depending on your plan. We always recommend calling your health plan to check your deductible and in-network coverage.

faqs.question: What if I have insurance coverage and don’t pay cash for services?

children.text: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, JCB or UnionPay. We do not accept cash or checks at this time.

faqs.question: What payment types do you accept?

children.text: We recommend messaging a care coordinator in regards to the procedure/service you are looking for. If we offer the service we can send you a link to book your appointment with cost information, or send you contact information for a referral.

faqs.question: I can't find my procedure/service, what should I do?
